About: It is an annual run through Greater Manchester.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Great Run series of road races in the UK.
ConsistsOf: It consists of a 10k run since it was established in 2003.
It consists of a half marathon since 2017.
The half marathon course consists of the 10k course with a 7-mile detour.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by being the largest 10k race of its type in Europe.
It is characterized by being the third-largest mass participation running event in the United Kingdom.
It is characterized by its course starting and finishing in Manchester city centre.
It is characterized by its half marathon course consisting of the 10k course with a 7-mile detour.
It is characterized by the 2007 race having an estimated 28,000 participants.
It is characterized by the 2008 race having almost 25,000 runners complete the course.
It is characterized by the 2009 edition being expanded to include the Great City Games.
It is characterized by around 33,000 runners signing up for the 10 kilometres race in 2009.
It is characterized by the addition of The Great City Games bringing much attention to the event.
HeldIn: It was held in Greater Manchester.
IsA: It is the largest 10k race of its type in Europe.
It is the third-largest mass participation running event in the United Kingdom.
LocatedIn: It is located in Greater Manchester.
OccurredIn: It occurred in Manchester city centre.
PartOf: It is part of the Great Run series of road races in the UK.
PerformedBy: It was performed by Briton Jo Pavey.
It was performed by Kenyan Micah Kogo.
It was performed by Rose Cheruiyot.
It was performed by Bezunesh Bekele.
It was performed by Austrian Günther Weidlinger.
It was performed by Ukrainian Serhiy Lebid.
It was performed by Sweden's Mustafa Mohamed.
It was performed by Haile Gebrselassie.
It was performed by Vivian Cheruiyot.
It was performed by Brian Alldis.
It was performed by Shelly Woods.
It was performed by Olympic Champions Usain Bolt.
It was performed by Christine Ohuruogu.
It was performed by Debbie Ferguson-McKenzie.
It was performed by Ivory Williams.
It was performed by British Olympians Marlon Devonish.
It was performed by Donna Fraser.
WonBy: It was won by Briton Jo Pavey.
It was won by Kenyan Micah Kogo.
It was won by Rose Cheruiyot.
It was won by Bezunesh Bekele.
It was won by Austrian Günther Weidlinger.
It was won by Haile Gebrselassie.
It was won by Vivian Cheruiyot.
It was won by Brian Alldis.
It was won by Shelly Woods.
It was won by Usain Bolt.
It was won by Debbie Ferguson-McKenzie.
